prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: ASR-SURVIVALWHISTLEMULTILED Product Type: SURVIVAL_KIT Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Kids Survival 7 in 1 Multitool with Whistle Compass LED Flashlight, Green Description: This is a simple and fun to use 7 in 1 waterproof survival multipurpose tool. It includes a whistle, thermometer, 5X magnifier, signal mirror, LED flashlight, compass and storage compartment for small items.

Get the kids off the couch and get them outside. This is a great emergency preparedness item to teach children basic camping and survival skills that have been handed down to you by your parents, their parents, and of course the Boy Scouts.

This survival multitool is a start to good preparation and essential outdoor safety. Search Terms: hiking gear backpacking accessories camping supplies emergency survival kit kids camping wilderness hiking gear backpacking accessories camping supplies emergency survival kit Features: - Thermometer (Fahrenheit & Celsius) - 5x Magnifier | Signal Mirror - LED Flashlight | Storage Compartment - Safety Whistle | Compass - Teach Kids About Outdoor Camping and Hiking Safety === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 7 in 1 Green Kids Survival Multitool Whistle

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor Green Kids Survival 7 In 1 Multitool

anthropic.title_differentiation: Waterproof, LED Flashlight, Compass, Thermometer, 5X Magnifier, Signal Mirror, Emergency Preparedness

openai.title_differentiation: Waterproof, Thermometer, 5X Magnifier, Signal Mirror, LED Flashlight, Compass, Whistle, Storage Compartment
